cases.input: Hero line: 'Our revolutionary AI-powered platform empowers teams to leverage data for unprecedented growth.' Rewrite.
cases.rubric: Replaces with a number-led benefit line; cuts all four banned adjectives; ends with an explicit verb.

cases.input: Write the landing-page copy for: 'Free 14-day trial of our generic project management tool.'
cases.rubric: Pushes back on the weak/generic positioning before writing; asks for a specific differentiator.

cases.input: Write a 280-char Twitter post and a paragraph LinkedIn post for the same product launch.
cases.rubric: Two clearly different voices; Twitter punchier, LinkedIn more measured.
